The '''Shock Hauler 33''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Incom Corporation/Legends|Incom Corporation]]. A modified one, the ''[[Goonga Munt Goonga]]'', was the starfighter of the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] and ace [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Scranton Toon]].<ref name="GC6" />

{{Ship-stub}}
